about.label: — about me
about.intro: A designer-developer whose path has run through floristry, art, and formal design education — and now front-end development and data science. Every stop has shaped how I approach problems.
about.bio.heading: Who is Marily?
about.bio.p1: I'm a creative technologist with over 20 years of experience at the intersection of art, design, and visual storytelling. Having built a professional career across floristry, visual design, and artistic practice, I bring strong aesthetic judgment, client experience, and strategic thinking into the digital space.
about.bio.p2: In recent years, I have deepened my expertise in technology through applied higher education in Graphic Design and Interactive Media, alongside focused studies in Python, web development, and data analysis.
about.bio.p3: I'm particularly interested in building visually refined, user-centered digital solutions through front-end development and data visualization — where structure meets creativity and data becomes meaningful. I'm also exploring applied AI and machine learning in creative and data-driven solutions.
about.skills.heading: What I use
about.timeline.heading: My journey
about.timeline.t1.title: Florist — Christmas Rose OÜ
about.timeline.t1.desc: Creating floral arrangements (bouquets, wedding bouquets, wreaths, decorations) and running shop operations. Competed in the Estonian Floristry Championship in 2007.
about.timeline.t2.title: Diploma in Drawing and Painting — London Art College
about.timeline.t2.desc: Art education in the United Kingdom, laying the foundation for my later career as an artist.
about.timeline.t3.title: Artist/Designer — Marily's Art Nest (UK)
about.timeline.t3.desc: Ran my own art business in the UK: painting and art sales, commissioned work, client base building, workshop facilitation, marketing, and e-shop management.
about.timeline.t4.title: Diploma in Illustrating Children's Books — London Art College
about.timeline.t4.desc: Continued studies in illustration, alongside running my own art business.
about.timeline.t5.title: Graphic Design — Kuressaare Regional Training School
about.timeline.t5.desc: Vocational education in graphic design — logos, banners, layout.
about.timeline.t6.title: Florist — Leandra Trading OÜ
about.timeline.t6.desc: Creating floral arrangements and running day-to-day shop operations — purchasing, displays, client and partner relations.
about.timeline.t7.title: Artist — Marily's Art Nest (Estonia)
about.timeline.t7.desc: My art practice continues in Estonia in a new form: gallery sales, exhibitions, event organizing, and social media management.
about.timeline.t8.title: Interaction Design (UI/UX) — Kuressaare Regional Training School
about.timeline.t8.desc: Vocational education in user interface and user experience design.
about.timeline.t9.title: Front-end Development & Data Science
about.timeline.t9.desc: Self-directed study in React, Python, and data science — building a modern portfolio and transitioning into tech.
about.timeline.t10.title: Florist — Öölill
about.timeline.t10.desc: Creating floral arrangements and running shop operations, same core responsibilities as at Leandra Trading.
about.values.heading: What I believe in
about.values.clarity.title: Clarity
about.values.clarity.desc: The best solution is one anyone can understand, whether it's design, code, or a floral arrangement.
about.values.curiosity.title: Curiosity
about.values.curiosity.desc: Every new skill has opened a door to the next. I keep learning, even when the first solution already works.
about.values.craft.title: Craft
about.values.craft.desc: Details matter — in code, in design, and in flowers. Good work shows that its author cares.
